message:
fix(command,conformance): export eval_script, fix lua_eval test indentation, add CONFIG SET fixtures for persistence

- Export eval_script from fr-command crate via pub use in lib.rs
- Fix indentation and brace alignment in lua_eval tests
  (select_negative_index, empty_while_loop_hits_iteration_limit)
- Remove duplicate closing brace in test module
- Add core_server.json conformance fixtures for CONFIG SET before
  SAVE/BGSAVE/BGREWRITEAOF to set RDB dir/dbfilename and appendonly
  mode, matching Redis persistence workflow expectations

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
